description_long: This is a medium-sized, orange pumpkin with a rough, weathered surface and a short, slightly curved brown stem on top. The front face is carved in a traditional jack-o'-lantern style, featuring two triangular eyes and a jagged, toothy mouth, all cut through to reveal the hollow interior. The pumpkin's skin displays natural grooves, blemishes, and dark patches, giving it an aged and realistic appearance. The back and sides are uncarved, showing only the textured, ribbed surface typical of a mature pumpkin. The stem is dry and slightly twisted, adding to the organic look. There are no visible decorative accessories or additional modifications beyond the facial carving.
description: A weathered orange pumpkin with a brown stem, carved in a classic jack-o'-lantern style with triangular eyes and a jagged mouth.
description_view_0: The front view shows the carved face with triangular eyes and a jagged mouth, as well as the prominent stem.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the uncarved, textured pumpkin surface and the stem, with the carved face partially visible on the right edge.
description_view_2: The back view displays the uncarved, ribbed pumpkin surface and the stem, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the uncarved pumpkin surface with some dark patches and the stem, with the carved face partially visible on the left edge.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional jack-o'-lantern face with two triangular eyes and a jagged, toothy mouth cut through the front. The style is classic and simple, with no additional motifs or etchings.
